message: Secure approval now has a real dismissal postcondition; permission targeting is reversible. Focused lab tests pass. Next: disposable-VM proof.

P02.phase: VirtualHID active; waiting for Kanata permissions
P02.detail: The DriverKit extension is activated and enabled, and the VirtualHID daemon passed health checks. Observable remapping waits on Kanata permissions.

nextTasks.label: Receive trusted captured input from P01
Package output observation as a reusable assertion

P02.blocker: VirtualHID is healthy, but output cannot be attributed to KeyPath until P01 supplies a trusted captured-input event.

P01.phase: Harness hardening validated; next proof is inside a disposable VM
P01.detail: Secure-dialog handling now requires the sheet controls to disappear, and permission drag restores Finder and System Settings geometry on every exit. Focused contract tests pass.

nextTasks.label: Verify secure-dialog dismissal and protected state
Prove a non-hardware input path reaches Kanata HID capture

P01.blocker: Input Monitoring approval still needs a disposable-VM proof, and RFB key delivery may bypass the HID path Kanata observes.

updates.title: P01 harness guardrails pass
updates.message: Secure approval now has a real dismissal postcondition; permission targeting is reversible. Focused lab tests pass. Next: disposable-VM proof.

updates.title: Hardening permission orchestration
updates.message: Implementing sheet-dismissal verification and reversible System Settings geometry before the next VM proof.

updates.title: Clarified completion and blocker semantics
updates.message: Green block fill now means proven only. Progress lines are amber, retrying uses ↻, and P01/P02 hovers identify reusable blockers and downstream work they unlock.

updates.title: Hover checklists added
updates.message: Every block hover now includes What to do next with per-task status and progress. P01 shows the concrete harness-hardening sequence.

updates.title: Input Monitoring path needs hardening
updates.message: The product gates through DriverKit are proven. Input Monitoring is not yet claimed: the drag failed its row postcondition and secure input reported success while the auth sheet remained. Artifacts and exact targeting evidence are being preserved.

updates.title: Privileged helper proven
updates.message: The helper is running. Captured two targeting rules: AX bounds already match the Tart VNC viewport, and field-only secure input submits the Login Items sheet via its trailing newline.

updates.title: P01 fresh VM admitted
updates.message: P01 is actively running on the sole admitted Tart lease; P02 remains paused until Kanata permissions and runtime readiness pass.

updates.title: P01 permission automation merged
updates.message: PR #1138 merged as f5c53044. Accessibility and Input Monitoring setup are repeatable; the lease artifacts were collected and the VM was cleanly destroyed. Next active slice is the logged-in GUI installer action.

updates.title: P01 permission setup automated
updates.message: Fresh-VM proof passed for both Kanata permission rows using Finder drag plus postcondition-verified authorization. The reusable primitive is under local review before PR.

updates.title: P01 secure authorization merged
updates.message: PR #1137 is merged and master is current. Active work now narrows to selecting kanata-launcher in the Open panel and verifying its permission row appears.

updates.title: P01 secure authorization rebased
updates.message: PR #1137 is current with master and rerunning checks. Live VM evidence confirms the authorization sheet closes only after a valid credential and protected submit.

updates.title: P01 authorization false positive removed
updates.message: System Settings authorization is now independently verified. The remaining retry is file-picker selection, not credential entry or protected-click delivery.

updates.title: P01 calibrated click proven
updates.message: Fresh-VM proof succeeded: guarded RFB delivery plus PermissionOracle postcondition. PR #1135 carries the production parser fix.

updates.title: P01 fresh run admitted
updates.message: P01 is actively starting the first fresh VM run with merged admission and calibrated protected-click guards.

updates.title: P01 orchestration merged
updates.message: Automatic click calibration and self-documenting VM admission are merged. No agent is actively mutating this block while Tart is occupied.

updates.title: P01 safely waiting
updates.message: PR #1130 is code-green but reviewer infrastructure failed twice without a finding. The sole Tart VM is also owned by another agent; P01 is no longer pulsing.

updates.title: P01 calibration published
updates.message: PR #1130 is open. P01 is actively validating automatic per-lease coordinate calibration while another agent owns Tart.

updates.title: P01 parallel-safe calibration work
updates.message: P01 is actively developing automatic coordinate calibration while another agent owns Tart; no VM collision is occurring.

updates.title: P01 harness merged
updates.message: PR #1129 merged and master is current. P01 stays active for the fresh guarded permission run; P02 remains paused until Kanata starts.

updates.title: P01 published for review
updates.message: PR #1129 is open. P01 remains active while CI and the enforced Claude review validate the guarded-click harness.

updates.title: P01 click guard implemented
updates.message: P01 advanced: wrong-coordinate clicks now fail immediately instead of silently corrupting the permission flow. The focused harness suite passes.

updates.title: P01 wrong-page clicks now classified
updates.message: P01 converted the VM evidence into a harness contract: successful delivery is insufficient unless the intended System Settings page is verified before and after.

updates.title: P01 corrected coordinate transform
updates.message: P01 stepped back to fix a harness assumption: the current lease uses 1:1 RFB coordinates, not the prior lease’s 2x scale.

updates.title: P01 permission order clarified
updates.message: P01 found a real orchestration dependency: grant Full Disk Access before trusting the product’s Kanata permission verification.

updates.title: P02 driver activation proven
updates.message: P02 advanced: VirtualHID is activated and healthy. The remaining dependency is starting Kanata after P01 grants permissions.

updates.title: P01 permissions boundary
updates.message: P01 is actively completing Accessibility and Input Monitoring. The software-only VNC injection path is already proven.

updates.title: Protected driver submit needs VNC Return
updates.message: P02 reached the genuine driver authorization sheet. Password entry remains secret-safe; protected submit is moving to VNC Return with postcondition verification.

updates.title: Driver installation unblocked
updates.message: P02 is moving forward: helper is operational and the next installer recipes target VirtualHID and runtime services.

updates.title: Helper postcondition passed
updates.message: P01 recovered cleanly: helper authorization is now verified by keypath-cli, not inferred from the click.

updates.title: Output proof waiting on harness consent
updates.message: P02 has not failed; it is waiting for P01 to clear Peekaboo’s one-time consent and complete helper activation.
